60秒任务: 「复盘进步」：目标/困难/建议/复盘；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 目标｜习惯｜困难｜建议｜复盘｜未来重点
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s review what changed this week.（复盘开始）
I made progress with ___.（说明进步点）
I still need to work on ___.（说明待改进）
The biggest improvement was ___.（突出成果）
I noticed that ___ helps me.（发现有效方法）
I didn’t reach the goal, but I learned ___.（转折复盘）
What went well?（询问顺利点）
What should we change next time?（询问调整）
The plan worked because ___.（分析原因）
It didn’t work because ___.（分析问题）
Let’s keep the useful part.（保留有效策略）
We should adjust the schedule.（调整计划）
My next focus will be ___.（设定未来重点）
That’s real progress.（肯定进步）
I’ll continue with the new plan.（行动闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: progress, improvement, goal, plan, schedule, focus, useful part
Verbs: review, change, improve, notice, reach, learn
Adjectives / Adverbs: biggest, useful, real, new
Time / Place: this week, next time, next focus, with the new plan
Chunks: made progress, biggest improvement, what went well, adjust the schedule, next focus
